headline: PDPA enforcement sees only 8 penalties since 2013
context: The Personal Data Protection Act 2010, enforced since 2013, has resulted in only 8 enforcement actions and penalties in over a decade.

cards.big: Only 8 penalties issued under PDPA in 12 years since enforcement began
cards.sub: Data breaches affecting millions of Malaysians went largely unpunished

cards.big: PDPA 2010 excludes federal and state government data processing entirely
cards.sub: Public sector handles citizens' most sensitive data without PDPA oversight

cards.big: Malaysia's data breach notification requirement only introduced in 2024 amendment
cards.sub: Prior to amendment, companies had no obligation to inform affected individuals

cards.big: 2023 MySejahtera data breach exposed records of 13 million users
cards.sub: No prosecution resulted despite public outcry and parliamentary questions

cards.big: A data protection law with 8 penalties in 12 years protects the violators
JPDP received 478 complaints in 2024 but resolved only 67 with findings
